deals.deal: Free Cookie Thin — No Purchase Needed (July 20 Only)
deals.desc: Walk into any Crumbl store today and claim one free Cookie Thin (Pink Sugar, Chocolate Chip, S'mores, or Brownie Batter) — no app or rewards required.

deals.deal: $9.95 Value Meal — Burrito + Chips & Queso + Drink
deals.desc: Get a full burrito, chips and queso, and a drink for just $9.95 — one of the best everyday values at a fast-casual Mexican bowl chain.

deals.deal: Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $9.99
deals.desc: Order any Domino's pizza — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust — with any toppings for just $9.99 online or in-app through July 26.
Use code CUSTARDTIME in-app, online, or at a kiosk to get any frozen custard for just $3 at participating Shake Shack locations.

deals.deal: $5 Faves Menu — 3 Pieces of Chicken or Tenders + 2 Sides
deals.desc: Get three pieces of fried chicken or tenders with two individual sides for just $5 at participating Popeyes nationwide.

deals.deal: $16.99 Boneless Meal Box — 20 Wings + Large Fry + 2 Dips
deals.desc: Score 20 boneless wings, a large fry, and two dips for $16.99 — Wingstop's revived soccer-season value bundle.

deals.deal: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box — App Everyday Deal
deals.desc: The Luxe Cravings Box packs a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips & nacho cheese, and a medium drink for $5.99 via app.
App-exclusive bundle includes a value bean & cheese burrito, grilled chicken snacker, chicken cheddar roller, crispy chicken taco, and a 16-oz drink for $6.99.

deals.deal: $5 Meal Deal — McDouble or McChicken + 4-pc Nuggets + Fries + Drink
deals.desc: The everyday $5 Meal Deal in the McDonald's app includes your choice of McDouble or McChicken, 4-pc nuggets, small fries, and a small drink.

deals.deal: $5 Your Way Meal — Daily App Deal
deals.desc: Order any Your Way Meal from the BK app daily for $5 — choose your sandwich, fries, nuggets, and drink combination.

deals.deal: Biggie Deals — $4, $6, and $8 Bundles in App
deals.desc: Wendy's Biggie Deals offer tiered value bundles at $4, $6, and $8 with sandwiches, nuggets, fries, and a drink via the app.
Get any Arby's Slider for just $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time — no app required.
IHOP's $6 Value Menu offers breakfast and diner staples at just $6 each, available all day at participating locations — great for late-night diners.
Use code FL599 in the Subway app to get a footlong sub for $5.99 — availability varies by zip code but active at many locations nationwide.

deals.deal: Throwback Value Menu — $10 Medium 1-Topping Stuffed Crust
deals.desc: Pizza Hut's Throwback Value Menu brings back a medium 1-topping Stuffed Crust pizza for just $10 plus other classic value items.
